title: AICP Webhook Registration
description: Schema for registering a webhook callback for AICP interaction events.

registration_id.description: Unique identifier for this registration, assigned by the sender.

interaction_id.description: Optional interaction scope. When present, only events for this interaction are delivered.

callback_url.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook deliveries.

events.description: Event types the receiver wants to subscribe to.

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. At least 32 characters.

backoff_seconds.description: Backoff intervals in seconds between retries.

expiry.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which the registration expires.
